title: Technical Support Engineer, Tunis - Remote
description:
Our Team
We’re a mission-driven support team dedicated to ensuring a smooth, reliable shipping experience for millions of customers. We value ownership, curiosity, and continuous learning, working closely with engineering, product, and operations to quickly resolve issues and strengthen our systems. Our culture centers on collaboration, support, and knowledge sharing, empowering every team member to make an impact from day one.
What You Will Do
Serve as a Technical Support Engineer, acting as first-line support during issues and helping prevent future problems. Configure customer accounts and work with monitoring tools to detect issues early. Troubleshoot technical issues by collaborating with engineering, product, and operations teams. Document common issues, best practices, and solutions to improve internal knowledge bases. Participate in on-call rotations to support urgent operational needs. Escalate complex or high-impact problems to the appropriate teams with clear, detailed information.
Your Qualifications
At Cimpress, we’re committed to building a support team enriched by diverse perspectives, fresh ideas, and unique experiences. Whether or not you meet every qualification, we encourage you to apply. Your background, problem-solving style, and drive to help others may make you an excellent fit for this role—or another opportunity on our team.
Flexibility to work shifts that align with the team’s operational needs. Experience with any logging/monitoring tool At least 2–3 years of hands-on experience in a support-focused position. Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English. A passion for solving problems, embracing challenges, and developing creative solutions. Patience, composure, and professionalism when working under pressure with cross-functional teams and stakeholders at all levels. A growth mindset with the motivation to learn, challenge existing processes, and drive continuous improvement.
Nice to Have
A BS in Computer Science/CIS/MIS/Engineering or equivalent certification or work experience. An understanding of process automation. Experience working with problem and incident management tools such as Jira, Pagerduty and New Relic. Experience working with tools such as GIT and Postman. Business analysis experiences.
Why You'll Love Working Here
This is a unique opportunity to lead and shape the future of impactful software solutions, working alongside a diverse and talented team. We strive to give you everything you need to learn, grow, and succeed and take a step forward in your learning journey – and your life. Through constant learning, collaboration, and perpetual exposure to what’s next, we’re always pushing boundaries and broadening our horizons. We have a Remote-First operating model and culture, with team members in over 15 countries and 30 US states, offering autonomy and the flexibility to work from home. Cimpress also provides collaboration spaces for team members to work physically together.
About Us
Led by founder and CEO Robert Keane, Cimpress invests in and helps build customer-focused, entrepreneurial mass customization businesses. Cimpress Technology develops cutting-edge, best-in-world software that our mass customization businesses use to create personalized physical (and digital) products, for over 17 million global customers. Our businesses can choose the solutions that work for them, or assemble any custom combination they need. This makes it easier and faster to do things like introduce new products, reach customers and track orders. And this kind of innovation keeps customers coming back.
Commitment to Diversity, Equity, & Inclusion
Cimpress exists to help our customers live their dreams. Each dream is unique – and the Cimpress team needs to be as well. We believe in the unique contributions of everyone within a diverse global organization. We are collaborative, inclusive, and innovative. We strive to role model and live an inclusive culture of fairness, respect and belonging for all. And we work together to empower each other, creating a space in which each of us can spark our next great idea.
Equal Opportunity Employer
Cimpress Technology, a Cimpress company, is an Equal Employment Opportunity Employer. All qualified candidates will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, sex, national or ethnic origin, nationality, age, religion, citizenship, disability, medical condition, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender presentation, legal or preferred name, marital status, pregnancy, family structure, veteran status or any other basis protected by human rights laws or regulations. This list is not exhaustive and, in fact, in many cases, we strive to do more than the law requires.

title: Helpdesk & Customer Success Operations Agent - Tunis
description:
What you'll do
Do you excel at organization and enjoy helping others? Become a Helpdesk & Customer Success Operations Agent and be the first point of contact for our clients, managing support tickets and assisting our Customer Success Managers with operational tasks. In our fast-paced, expanding company, you’ll have the opportunity to wear multiple hats, adapt to new challenges, and grow your skills in a supportive environment — with a hybrid setup in Tunis, Tunisia.
Why we should decide on you
We are looking for a structured, reliable, and detail-oriented individual to join our Customer Success team as a Helpdesk & Customer Success Operations Agent. In this role, you will serve as a first-line contact for client support, while contributing to 24/7 global service coverage as part of a Follow the Sun (FTS) model.
As one of the first hires in your region, you will play a key role in helping us scale our support presence, streamline helpdesk operations, and provide back-office support to Customer Success Managers (CSMs). This is a role for someone who thrives in a fast-moving, international environment and wants to help improve the way we support and serve our clients.
Key Responsibilities
Helpdesk & Client Support:
Act as the first point of contact for client inquiries via platforms like Jira Service Desk, Zendesk, or similar.
Triage and route tickets efficiently to the right internal teams, ensuring high-quality data capture and follow-up.
Monitor ticket queues, track resolution status, and escalate time-sensitive issues where needed.
Keep all client interactions and internal updates well-documented and easy to follow.
Customer Success Operations:
Provide back-office support to Customer Success Managers (CSMs) through CRM maintenance, meeting coordination, follow-up tracking, and internal workflows.
Help ensure accurate records and consistent updates across systems for full customer visibility.
Assist in improving internal CS processes, templates, and playbooks as the organization scales.
Global Coordination & Internal Operations:
Participate in a rotating on-call schedule to support time-sensitive tickets outside regular hours.
Ensure seamless handover and coordination with other regions as part of the Follow the Sun support model.
Contribute to internal reporting, operational documentation, and data entry tasks with a high standard of accuracy.
Identify recurring patterns or inefficiencies in workflows and suggest improvements.
Additional Scope (Where Applicable):
Occasionally assist with basic SaaS platform tasks, such as user access, permission changes, or routine configuration support.
Triage SaaS-related requests accurately and route them to the appropriate product or support teams.
Help refine internal FAQs and routing logic based on ticket experience.
Why we should decide on you:
Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Busineiss Administration, or a related field (preferred, but equivalent experience is acceptable)
Experience in helpdesk, IT support, customer support, or other service-oriented roles is a plus.
Experience working with ticketing systems, CRM platforms, or internal workflow tools.
Proven ability to manage and prioritize multiple requests with structure and attention to detail.
Strong written and verbal communication skills in English.
Willingness to participate in on-call or weekend coverage as part of a global rotation.
Your Key Attributes:
Highly organized and detail-oriented, with a strong sense of ownership and responsibility.
Brings structure and clarity to complex or ambiguous workflows.
Calm, dependable, and service-oriented, even under pressure.
Enjoys building efficient internal processes and improving day-to-day operations.
Works well across time zones and cultures, and is comfortable in a globally distributed team.
Curious and motivated to grow into broader Customer Success operations, enablement, or support coordination roles.
Why you should decide on us
Let’s grow together, join a market leading SaaS company – our agile character and culture of innovation enables you to design our future.
We provide you with the opportunity to take on responsibility and participate in international projects.
In addition to our buddy-program, we offer numerous individual and wide-ranging training opportunities during which you can explore technical and functional areas.
Our internal mobility initiative encourages colleagues to transfer cross functionally to gain experience and promotes knowledge sharing.
We are proud of our positive working atmosphere characterized by a supportive team across various locations and countries and transparent communication across all levels.
Together we're better - meet your colleagues at our numerous team events.
Apply for this job now
About Us
Regnology is a leading international provider of innovative regulatory, risk, and supervisory technology solutions (RegTech, RiskTech, and SupTech), of AEOI and tax reporting products, as well as of services along the Regulatory Value Chain for financial services. Regnology has been a partner for banks and regulators for 25 years. Until the end of 2020, the company was part of BearingPoint group and operated under the name BearingPoint RegTech. Since the sale of the RegTech business to private equity firm Nordic Capital, the company has been independent. In June 2021, the company joined forces with Vizor Software and recently changed its name to Regnology. In total, Regnology serves more than 7,000 financial services firms with reporting solutions. At the same time, the company enables more than 50 regulators and tax authorities on five continents to collect data from 34,000 firms in 60 countries. Regnology has a total workforce of over 770 employees at 17 office locations in 12 countries.
Any questions? Feel free to get in touch:
recruiting@regnology.net

title: Technicien Service Desk junior H/F
description:
À propos de nous
Chez EY, nous vous offrons l’opportunité de construire une carrière qui vous ressemble, au sein d’un environnement international, porté par une culture inclusive, un accompagnement de qualité et des solutions technologiques de pointe.
EY rassemble aujourd'hui près de 340 000 associés et collaborateurs à travers le monde dans plus de 154 pays. Grâce à ce réseau, dont le niveau d'intégration et l'ampleur internationale sont gages d'une même excellence partout dans le monde, EY renforce sa position de leader mondial de l'Audit, du Conseil, des Transactions, de la Fiscalité et du Droit.
Nous faisons grandir les talents afin qu'ensemble, ils accompagnent les organisations vers une croissance pérenne. Et notre engagement envers nos équipes commence avec cette promesse : quel que soit votre parcours avec nous, l'expérience EY dure toute une vie.
Chez EY, chaque collaborateur est encouragé à exprimer son point de vue, à valoriser son expertise et à s’engager pour contribuer à bâtir un meilleur environnement de travail et de confiance.
Contexte
Dans le cadre de nos activités de gestion des opérations IT pour le compte de tiers, l’équipe Service Desk contribue à l’exécution des services ITSM via la plateforme Service Now, au sein d’une organisation composée d’un Service Delivery Manager (SDM) et de techniciens Service Desk, en collaboration avec les équipes locales, afin de garantir la continuité, la fiabilité et la qualité des services aux utilisateurs du SI.
Dans ce contexte, nous recrutons plusieurs profils (Junior et Senior) pour renforcer l’équipe et assurer la performance globale du Service Desk.
Ce que nous recherchons
Bac +3/4 en Informatique, Gestion de Projet ou équivalent.
Première expérience en support IT ou stage significatif dans un environnement Microsoft (Windows, M365) et Apple Mac.
Notions de processus ITSM et pratique basique de Service Now.
Bonnes compétences relationnelles et sens du service client.
Français courant et anglais professionnel.
Rigoureux, organisé et capacité à apprendre rapidement dans un environnement dynamique.
Votre rôle
Répondre aux demandes d’assistance technique et incidents via Service Now ou téléphone.
Suivre la prise en charge des tickets et escalades selon les priorités.
Traiter les demandes simples relevant du périmètre du Service Desk.
Mettre à jour la base de connaissances et documenter les résolutions.
Respecter les SLA et KPI définis pour le Service Desk.
Pourquoi nous rejoindre ?
Contribuer à des missions IT stratégiques pour des clients internationaux.

title: 1 -  Specialist Test Technology  Engineer
description:
LEONI is a global provider of products, solutions, and services for energy and data management in the automotive industry. With around 87,000 employees in 21 countries and EUR 5 billion in sales in 2024, we are a leading supplier of complex wiring systems and customer‑specific cable harnesses.
We believe that meaningful connections drive innovation and success. At LEONI, you will join a diverse, international, and collaborative team shaping the future of mobility, from autonomous driving to alternative drives and smart charging solutions.
Since mid‑2025, we have been part of the Luxshare Group, one of the world’s leading solution providers for consumer electronics, communications and data centers, automotive, and medical industries, based in China. Join us and help shape the future of connectivity together.
Job Description
Creates and reviews test technology local work instructions
Supports: - test equipment and test tools development (design, test modules, specific processes, etc.) - technical error analyses for customer claims and complaints - the identification of root causes in case of process disturbances and searching for solutions
Creates and develops the test sequences and programs according to requirements - for building of test tables, test boards and vision tests, internally or externally - for installation and validation of test equipment - in order to change the test programs, test tables, test boards and vision systems during product changes and new introduction (Change Management & Project Management)
Ensures test programs and tests parameters used during initial setup
Provides feedback to Production Technology related to test modules functionality and design
Ensures backup of test programs and test parameters

IT: Microsoft Office

People of all genders are always meant equally; for linguistic simplification and better readability, only the masculine form is used in the text.

title: Service desk Analyst
description:
Description de l'entreprise
Everience est un groupe international de conseil et de services numériques, rassemblant plus de 4 000 collaborateurs et réalisant un chiffre d’affaires de 280 M€. Présent en Europe, en Afrique, en Asie et en Amérique, le groupe met en avant l’expertise et l’accompagnement humain au service des DSI et des métiers.
Notre cœur de métier repose sur la gestion du support utilisateur, le support applicatif, la gestion des actifs IT, ainsi que les activités de Gouvernance, Risque et Conformité (GRC). Nous proposons à nos collaborateurs un environnement exigeant et stimulant, où ils peuvent développer leurs compétences techniques, évoluer dans les métiers de l’IT et construire une trajectoire professionnelle solide.
Everience TUNISIA est spécialisée dans l’infogérance du support utilisateur. Nos équipes assurent un service fiable, structuré et orienté satisfaction client, en apportant un accompagnement quotidien aux collaborateurs des entreprises.
Le groupe investit également dans les technologies émergentes dont l’intelligence artificielle afin de renforcer les outils, les processus et l’expérience collaborateur. Grâce à la Symbiotic Academy, everience propose un espace de formation et de montée en compétences pour préparer les métiers de demain tout en consolidant les fondamentaux d’aujourd’hui.
Entreprise inclusive et engagée et valorise la diversité des profils et soutient l’évolution professionnelle. Rejoindre everience, c’est intégrer un parcours dans l’IT, avec :
des perspectives d’évolution concrètes,
des formations certifiantes,
un environnement responsable et bienveillant,
et l’opportunité d’explorer progressivement les nouveaux usages liés à l’IA.
Description du poste
En tant que technicien support vous serez amené à :
Diagnostiquer à distance un dysfonctionnement informatique matériel ou logiciel
Configurer le poste de travail aux besoins de l'utilisateur et effectuer les tests de fonctionnement
Guider l'utilisateur pour résoudre l’incident ou prendre le contrôle du système à distance
Escalader si besoin les incidents non résolus en restant attentif aux engagements de délai des interventions, et tenir informé l’utilisateur
Réaliser un descriptif précis de l’intervention après chaque appel et renseigner les champs nécessaires dans l’outil de gestion des incidents
Qualifications
Passionné, diplômé en Informatique, ou vous possédez une expérience de 2 ans minimum en support utilisateurs ou en centre de contact
Vous êtes fraichement diplômé ou pensez à une reconversion professionnelle
Vous parlez aisément le Français et/ou l’Anglais
Vous êtes flexible sur une large plage horaire et/ou cherchez un travail hybride
Informations supplémentaires
Afin de mener à bien votre mission, vous bénéficiez de plusieurs atouts :
une formation métier (rémunérée dès votre intégration)
un environnement de travail très agréable et convivial
des moments festifs au cours desquels on célèbre les succès personnels, collectifs et le plaisir de travailler ensemble
des formations certifiantes débouchant sur une perspective d’évolution
un package salarial attractif
de multiples autres avantages (par exemple : prime de transport, assurance groupe, primes de mariage/scolarité, forfait téléphonique illimité + Airbox 55Go/mois…)
Si cela vous parle, n’attendez plus et rejoignez-nous !

title: AI Solutions System Admin
description:
SBS
works with more than 1,500 banks, building societies and specialized finance providers across more than eighty countries worldwide. We help them to develop, deliver and operationalise their digital transformation strategies. Using our suite of digital banking products and services enables these organisations to deliver remarkable financial services to their clients.
Summary
Job Description
We’re looking for a Commercial Systems Administrator to own the operational backbone of our revenue technology stack - with a primary focus on conversation intelligence and sales engagement & enablement platforms like Gong.This is a high-impact role for someone who wants to sit at the intersection of technology and commercial performance.
You'll be the trusted expert ensuring our Sales, RevOps, and Leadership teams have reliable, intelligently configured tools that drive productivity, insight, and consistent execution across the business. If you enjoy bringing order to complexity, translating business needs into smart system design, and being the person people turn to when tools need to work flawlessly - this role is for you.
Role Responsibilities
Platform Administration & Optimisation
You’ll be the expert administrator for our commercial technology ecosystem:
Own the end-to-end configuration, administration, and ongoing optimisation: users, permissions, team structures, compliance settings.
Design and maintain insight frameworks: trackers, keywords, topics, call libraries, scorecards, and coaching dashboards used by sales leadership.
Drive adoption of advanced capabilities: forecasting modules, deal intelligence, AI powered insights.
Expand your ownership: As our tech stack grows, you’ll take on administration of additional platforms.
Data Quality, Reliability & Operations
Monitor system health across the commercial tech stack and proactively address issues
Troubleshoot integrations: Resolve sync problems between Gong, Responsive, Salesforce, and other connected tools.
Maintain data integrity: Ensure accuracy consistency and compliance across platforms.
Document everything: Build clear, accessible documentation for configurations, processes, and user guidance.
Partnership & User Support
Partner closely with key stakeholders, such as Sales reps, Sales Leadership, Revenue Operations, and Sales Enablement
Translate business needs into system design: Work with stakeholders to understand requirements and implement solutions.
Provide proactive user support: Triage requests, prioritise by business impact, and resolve issues efficiently
Drive Continuous Improvement: Proactively identify opportunities to improve adoption, usability, and insight
generation.
Qualifications
Essential
1-3 years of experience administering commercial/sales tools, (Gong, Outreach, Salesforce, conversational
intelligence, or sales enablement platforms)
Strong technical fluency with SaaS platforms, user management, permissions, and integrations.
Analytical mindset: Comfortable working with dashboards, reports, data flows, and troubleshooting technical issues
Exceptional attention to detail: You catch what others miss and maintain high standards for data quality
Process-oriented thinking: You naturally create structure, follow governance frameworks and promote documentation.
Clear communication skills: You explain technical concepts simply and effectively across teams and time zones.
English proficiency: Strong written and verbal communication required for global collaboration.
Note: Candidates are required to submit their CV in English.
Desirable
Hands-on experience with Gong, Outreach, Responsive.io, Qobra, or similar platforms.
Exposure to Salesforce or other CRM environments and CRM integrations.
Understanding of B2B sales processes: pipeline stages, forecasting, deal progression, and sales
methodologies.
Experience supporting distributed or remote sales teams across multiple regions.
Background in Sales Operations, Revenue Operations, Enablement, or Business Systems.
Additional Information
About Working With Us:
We value operational excellence and commercial impact. You'll own the day-to-day administration while partnering closely with Sales, Enablement, and RevOps leaders who care about getting tools right. We prioritize learning ability over checkbox experience - if you're a systems thinker who understands commercial operations and can learn quickly, we want to hear from you even if you haven't administered every tool in our stack

title: Business Development Coordinator
description:
Job Title: Business Development Coordinator
Department:
Business Development
Location:
South Mediterranean University (SMU)
Reports To:
Business Development Director
Job Summary
The Business Development Coordinator supports the implementation of SMU’s corporate engagement strategy by assisting with data management, event coordination, communication activities, and partner relationship logistics. This role requires strong organizational, analytical, and communication skills to ensure smooth execution of internal processes and external-facing initiatives that contribute to the university’s development and visibility.
Key Responsibilities
Data Management & Analysis
Clean, classify, and maintain databases related to partnerships and business development activities.
Prepare and structure data for accreditation purposes (e.g., EPAS).
Draft the annual Business Development report based on performance data and partner engagement.
Monitor and follow up on ongoing collaborations with company partners.
Interdepartmental Collaboration
Ensure coordination between the Business Development Department and other internal departments (e.g., Career Services, IT, Communication).
Share relevant internship and job opportunities with Career Services.
Event & Partnership Coordination
Manage logistics for Business Development events including workshops, conferences, and company visits.
Coordinate with partners and guests to ensure effective external engagement.
Track and manage event attendance and related documentation.
Handle partnership-related paperwork and follow-up processes.
Communication & Visibility
Maintain and grow the Business Development Department’s LinkedIn profile and presence.
Promote internal and external events related to Business Development.
Maintain ongoing communication with clients, partners, and stakeholders to support long-term engagement.
Required Competencies And Skills
Communication & Interpersonal Skills
Excellent written and verbal communication skills in both French and English.
Ability to engage confidently with internal teams, external partners, and stakeholders.
Strong interpersonal skills with a collaborative and service-oriented mindset.
Organizational & Analytical Skills
Proven ability to prioritize tasks, manage multiple deadlines, and handle logistical coordination.
Strong attention to detail with the ability to analyze data, track performance, and generate reports.
Autonomy and initiative in driving forward projects and follow-up actions.
Technical Proficiency
Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word, PowerPoint).
Comfortable working with databases, CRM tools, and digital platforms (e.g., LinkedIn).
Required Qualifications
Bachelor’s degree in Business, Communication, Marketing, or a related field.
Prior experience in event coordination, administrative support, or partnership management.
Familiarity with the higher education or corporate training sector is a plus.
To apply, please send your CV and cover letter to hr.development@smu.tn

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
description:
Position Title:
Cybersecurity Analyst
Department:
IT Services
Reports To:
IT Department Senior Manager
Position Overview
The Cybersecurity Analyst is responsible for protecting SMU’s information systems, networks, and digital assets. This role plays a critical part in ensuring the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of institutional data while supporting SMU’s academic and operational activities.
The ideal candidate is a technically skilled professional with a strong sense of responsibility and ethics, capable of identifying risks, responding to incidents, and continuously improving SMU’s cybersecurity posture in line with international standards and best practices.
Key Responsibilities
Security Operations and Risk Management
Ensure the security of systems, networks, applications, and databases.
Identify, analyze, and remediate vulnerabilities across the IT environment.
Implement and maintain information security policies and procedures (ISMS / PSSI).
Monitor security events and manage incident response activities.
Auditing, Testing, and Compliance
Conduct security audits, vulnerability assessments, and penetration tests.
Support compliance with cybersecurity frameworks and regulations (ISO 27001, GDPR, etc.).
Maintain technical documentation, procedures, and security reports.
Monitoring and Tool Management

title: IT/Infrastructure Project Manager
description:
What you'll do
We are seeking an experienced Project Manager to join our Managed Services onboarding team. In this role, you’ll mainly contribute to onboard new and existing client to Regnology Cloud, a SaaS Platform to deploy and manage Regnology Product instances in Google Cloud. You will collaborate closely with Site Reliability Engineers and other various teams (R Cloud, IT, Professional Services, Customer Success, etc.). Your technical expertise, learning skills and communication abilities will be essential for success.
Perform a wide variety of tasks during software implementation projects. This primarily includes, but is not limited to, project management and leading SRE collaborators, facilitating client technical workshops, and coordinating all parties involved with clear and efficient communication.
Internal optimization and automation of tasks and processes related to our solution.
Actively contribute to business development efforts and successful onboarding of clients.
Why we should decide on you
Successfully completed university studies in the field of informatics, computer science or a similar area
You have a first experience in project management and leading software implementation teams.
You possess strong skills in facilitating client workshops and translating business needs into clear functional requirements.
You are adept at identifying opportunities for process optimization.
You have a proven track record in client relationship management.
You demonstrate excellent problem-solving skills, self-initiative, adaptability, and effective communication with both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
Why you should decide on us
Market Leadership: Join a global leader where our agile culture and innovative spirit allow you to shape the future of financial stability.
International Scope: Take ownership of high-profile international projects and benefit from our global internal mobility initiatives.
Growth & Mentorship: Access a wide range of our technical and functional training opportunities.
Culture of Inclusion: We foster a supportive, transparent atmosphere with frequent team events and a commitment to diversity.
To get a first impression, we only need your CV and look forward to meeting you in a (personal/virtual) interview! Recognizing the benefits of working in diverse teams, we are committed to equal employment opportunities regardless of gender, age, nationality, ethnic or social origin, disability, and sexual identity. Are you interested? Apply now! https://www.regnology.net
MS_2025_10
Apply for this job now
About Us
Regnology is a leading international provider of innovative regulatory, risk, and supervisory technology solutions (RegTech, RiskTech, and SupTech), of AEOI and tax reporting products, as well as of services along the Regulatory Value Chain for financial services. Regnology has been a partner for banks and regulators for 25 years. Until the end of 2020, the company was part of BearingPoint group and operated under the name BearingPoint RegTech. Since the sale of the RegTech business to private equity firm Nordic Capital, the company has been independent. In June 2021, the company joined forces with Vizor Software and recently changed its name to Regnology. In total, Regnology serves more than 7,000 financial services firms with reporting solutions. At the same time, the company enables more than 50 regulators and tax authorities on five continents to collect data from 34,000 firms in 60 countries. Regnology has a total workforce of over 770 employees at 17 office locations in 12 countries.
Any questions? Feel free to get in touch:
recruiting@regnology.net

Mettre en œuvre les bonnes pratiques de gouvernance, de sécurité et de qualité des données.
Documenter les architectures, les flux de données et les processus techniques.
Profil Recherché
Bac+5 en informatique, data engineering ou équivalent.
Expérience confirmée (3 à 5 ans) en tant que Data Engineer dans des environnements data complexes.
Maîtrise avancée de SQL et d’un langage de programmation (Python, Scala…).
Solide expérience sur les outils et frameworks de traitement de données (Airflow, Spark, DBT…).
Connaissance des environnements cloud (GCP, AWS, Azure) et des architectures orientées données.
Bonne compréhension des enjeux de qualité, sécurité et gouvernance des données.
Esprit analytique, rigueur et capacité à travailler en équipe.
Pourquoi nous rejoindre ?
Pour intégrer une équipe passionnée et experte dans l’écosystème data.
Pour travailler sur des projets à fort impact au cœur de la transformation digitale.
Pour bénéficier d’un environnement agile, stimulant et en constante évolution technologique.

We Humanize Technology
We are passionate experts who provide investment management and credit communities with innovative, user-friendly products which help their businesses grow in over 50 countries
Our environment is international, ego-free and relaxed. We believe in building confidence through giving clear responsibilities to our team members and managing to given goals and targets. We celebrate success and we enjoy each other’s company

JOIN THE MOVEMENT
We provide the investment management and credit communities with an innovative, user-friendly suite of products that, through detailed market and client insights, help their business to grow in over 50 countries.

With our agility, we make technology simple & accessible for our users. Let’s work together to achieve the best solutions for our clients.

Linedata est un éditeur de logiciels international ainsi qu’un fournisseur de services et de données à forte valeur ajoutée dédiés au secteur financier. Nous accompagnons nos clients — gestionnaires d’actifs traditionnels et alternatifs, administrateurs de fonds, établissements de crédit et de financement — dans leurs enjeux grâce à des solutions innovantes et performantes.
Forte de plus de 20 ans d’expérience dans la FinTech, Linedata offre à ses collaborateurs l’opportunité de développer une expertise solide à la fois en finance et en technologies, au sein d’un environnement international stimulant.
Nous Humanisons La Technologie
Parce que nous sommes indépendants, fiables, accessibles et engagés ; parce que nos équipes sont unies, attentives, bienveillantes et passionnées ; et parce que nos experts sont de véritables partenaires spécialisés à l’écoute, nous concevons des solutions qui se veulent des références mondiales.
Portés par un environnement en pleine transformation et par des clients qui doivent s’adapter, motivés par des entreprises collaboratives partageant notre esprit entrepreneurial et nos ambitions, nous libérons leur potentiel créatif pour fluidifier les flux financiers et soutenir l’économie. Nous aidons chacun à développer ses compétences et à bâtir sa dignité pour les générations futures.

Détecter et suivre les anomalies

Garantir la qualité des livrables

Solide capacité d’analyse et de résolution de problèmes
La connaissance du SQL est un atout
Profil Recherché
Titulaire d’un diplôme Bac+3 en informatique, data ou finance. Vous justifiez d’une première expérience en tant qu’analyste qualité dans un environnement ou un domaine similaire.

Engagement Pour La Diversité

Elle fait partie intégrante de notre façon de travailler et est impérative pour notre succès. title: Support technique informatique
description:
Planisware is a global provider of Project Portfolio Management software solutions designed to support product development, engineering, and IT business processes.
For more than
25 years
, we have succeeded in bringing together a passionate community of
800 employees
across Tunis, Paris, Nice, Lyon, Manchester, San Francisco, Philadelphia, Denver, Munich, and Tokyo. We've been committed to assisting over
500 organizations worldwide
in achieving strategic and innovative excellence, making confident business decisions, and increasing portfolio value.
Our Customer-centric culture and our strong focus on the delivery process and quality have defined us as a responsive and reliable partner, and the best ally on the road to success. With our deep expertise in technology and support process knowledge, we help Planisware customers maximize the value of their Planisware ecosystem.
What you’ll do
As a
Production Support Technician
at Planisware, you'll play a pivotal role in ensuring the seamless functioning of our clients' systems. Your responsibilities will include
Representing the Production Support team on company-wide project teams.
Using Nagios as a monitoring platform to ensure the environment's availability.
Conducting production support activities, including issue analysis, resolution, and assignment, adhering to predefined procedures
Act as the first line of response in case of incidents, initiating investigation and escalation procedures as needed.
Providing timely and professional responses to client issues within defined SLAs (service level agreements)
Prioritizing client incidents and managing multiple issues simultaneously.
Creating VMs and restoring environments using automated tools.
Raising production support issues to the project team.
Escalating and reporting incidents to the SaaS team.
What is expected of you
Bachelor's or Master's
degree in
information technology
Comfortable working in
Linux
environments, with the ability to perform basic
troubleshooting
.
Basic
database
skills, preferably in
PostgreSQL
Basic knowledge of
cloud infrastructure concepts
Strong written and oral communication skills in both
French and English.
A customer-centric mindset with a commitment to delivering exceptional service
Excellent punctuality and attention to detail
A critical mindset for problem-solving
⇉ Our support team operates in a
24/7 project environment
, working in three shifts daily (morning, afternoon, and night), including weekends.
What's in it for you?
Develop expertise by participating in knowledge-sharing events organized internally (talks, conferences, fairs)
Challenging and collaborative work environment
Group Insurance
Luncheon vouchers
Gym Membership
Additional bonuses for night shifts
As an employer, Planisware offers equal employment opportunities to all individuals, regardless of their gender, ethnicity, religion, sexual orientation, social status, disability, or age.

title: DATA SCIENTIST
description:
CDI
Tunis
Publié il y a 4 mois
RED TIC recherche un
Data Scientist
talentueux et passionné par la valorisation des données pour rejoindre notre équipe. Votre mission consistera à concevoir, développer et déployer des modèles analytiques et prédictifs afin d’orienter les décisions stratégiques de l’entreprise. Vous interviendrez à chaque étape du cycle de vie de la donnée — de sa collecte à son exploitation — dans un environnement collaboratif et orienté innovation.
Missions
Analyse Et Modélisation Des Données
Identifier, collecter et préparer les données issues de différentes sources internes et externes.
Concevoir et entraîner des modèles de machine learning et deep learning adaptés aux problématiques métier.
Évaluer la performance des modèles à l’aide de métriques pertinentes et les optimiser pour améliorer leur fiabilité.
Réaliser des analyses exploratoires et descriptives afin de détecter des tendances, corrélations et anomalies.
Exploitation Et Industrialisation
Collaborer avec les Data Engineers pour assurer la mise en production des modèles.
Développer des scripts et pipelines de traitement des données automatisés.
Participer à l’intégration des solutions analytiques dans les outils décisionnels de l’entreprise.
Documenter les modèles et assurer la traçabilité des résultats.
Collaboration Et Accompagnement
Travailler en étroite collaboration avec les équipes métiers pour comprendre leurs besoins et les traduire en solutions data-driven.
Présenter les résultats et insights de manière claire et visuelle (dashboards, visualisations, storytelling).
Participer à la diffusion d’une culture data au sein de l’entreprise.
Profil recherché
Formation Bac+5 en Data Science, Mathématiques appliquées, Informatique ou Statistiques.
Minimum 3 à 5 ans d’expérience sur un poste similaire.
Maîtrise des langages Python (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch) et SQL.
Solides compétences en statistiques, modélisation prédictive et analyse de données.
Bonne connaissance des environnements Cloud (AWS, Azure ou GCP) et des outils de visualisation (Power BI, Tableau, Looker).
Esprit analytique, rigueur scientifique et goût pour la résolution de problèmes complexes.
Excellentes capacités de communication pour vulgariser les résultats auprès des équipes métiers.
Pourquoi nous rejoindre ?
Intégrez une structure où la donnée est au cœur de la stratégie d’innovation.
Participez à des projets stimulants mêlant IA, automatisation et data engineering.
Collaborez avec des experts passionnés dans un environnement agile et collaboratif.
Bénéficiez d’un cadre de travail flexible et d’opportunités d’évolution à fort potentiel.

title: Business Analyst
description:
Job Description & Summary
La Digital Factory de PwC France & Maghreb conçoit, développe et opère une suite d’applications SaaS innovantes, déployées dans un environnement cloud Microsoft Azure.
Pour renforcer notre capacité de delivery et accompagner la croissance de nos produits digitaux, nous recrutons un/une Business Analyst qui travaillera en binôme avec un/une Product Manager au cœur des projets de la Digital Factory.
In programme management at PwC, you will oversee and coordinate multiple projects to facilitate successful delivery and alignment with organisational goals. Your work will involve strong leadership, communication, and problem-solving skills.
Votre rôle
En tant que Business Analyst, vous jouerez un rôle clé dans la compréhension des besoins métiers, la préparation des développements et le suivi opérationnel des produits. Vous serez le garant de la clarté fonctionnelle et de la qualité des livrables tout au long du cycle de vie produit.
Vos missions principales
Analyse & expression de besoin
Recueillir et analyser les besoins utilisateurs avec les équipes métiers et le Product Manager.
Rédiger les
user stories
et critères d’acceptation.
Contribuer à la gestion du backlog produit.
Animation & suivi du delivery
Participer aux rituels agiles (daily, refinement, review).
Clarifier les besoins auprès de l’équipe de développement.
Suivre l’avancement des sprints et les priorités opérationnelles.
Tests & qualité fonctionnelle
Préparer et réaliser les tests fonctionnels.
Identifier les anomalies et en suivre la résolution.
Garantir la conformité des développements aux besoins métiers.
Run & amélioration continue
Participer au suivi des KPI de run (performances, incidents, demandes d’évolution).
Contribuer à l’analyse et à la priorisation des tickets.
Accompagnement des utilisateurs & déploiement
Contribuer aux phases de déploiement et aux supports associés (guides, release notes).
Aider les métiers à prendre en main les nouvelles fonctionnalités.
Ce que nous recherchons
Expérience en tant Business Analyst dans un environnement digital, IT ou agile. (stage, alternance ou premier emplois).
Aisance dans la rédaction fonctionnelle et la communication avec équipes techniques.
Sens du détail, rigueur, capacité d’analyse et esprit collaboratif.
Connaissance des méthodologies agiles (Scrum, Kanban).
Nous recrutons des personnes, pas des profils parfaits.
Si cette opportunité vous intéresse mais que vous ne remplissez pas tous les critères, n’hésitez pas à postuler. Chacun mérite sa chance, et toute candidature peut apporter des enseignements ou déboucher sur une réussite.

title: Technical Support Engineer - L2
description:
About Us
At Medius, we believe managing finance should be about strategy, not stress. That same mindset shapes not only the solutions we build, but also the culture we create for our people. We remove complexity, embrace innovation, and give our teams the freedom to focus on what truly matters — whether that’s transforming the future of finance with AI or finding balance to go home on time.
Founded in Sweden in 2001, Medius has grown from a local startup into a global leader in cloud-based spend management solutions. Today, thousands of organizations worldwide trust us to simplify accounts payable and spend management processes. Our journey has been driven by continuous innovation, a passion for technology, and above all — the people who make it happen.
We’re more than a software company. We’re a team of problem-solvers, innovators and collaborators working together to reinvent the category of accounts payable. Our solutions use Artificial Intelligence to eliminate manual work, bring clarity, confidence, and control, and empower finance teams of the future.
At Medius,
our values guide how we work and grow together:
Connect – We believe in the power of people—individually and collectively—and our success depends on understanding and respecting each other. We appreciate that ‘empowering finance teams of the future’ is an exciting endeavor, and we share it with everyone around us.
Question – We enjoy the challenge of our work and the thrill of collaboration. We are not afraid to question ourselves and each other because we believe diverse perspectives can lead to better outcomes and that there is great power in resolution.
Own – We are thorough, thoughtful, and decisive. We anticipate what’s next, what a customer might need, and then we deliver. That’s how we get things done. And that’s how we remain a leader. Customers trust us to do our job so that they can focus on what they do best.
At Medius, you’ll join a diverse, global community where curiosity is celebrated, ideas matter, and innovation never stops. If you’re passionate about technology, eager to make an impact, and ready to grow alongside a team that lives its values, Medius is where you can do your best work — your impact is global.
Learn more at www.medius.com
Job Overview
As a Technical Support Engineer, you will work at the intersection of customers, product, and engineering. You will handle advanced technical issues, support integrations and configurations, and actively contribute to product stability and support excellence.
Responsibilities And Duties
Diagnose, analyze, and reproduce issues, providing detailed technical investigations and root cause analysis, across:
Web and mobile applications
REST APIs and third-party integrations (ERP, accounting tools, SSO, etc.)
Data consistency, performance, and synchronization
Monitor, track, and follow up on incidents to ensure customer satisfaction
Collaborate with Professional Services teams during customer implementations (advanced configuration, data cleanup, etc.)
Maintain and enrich internal technical documentation and troubleshooting guides
Proactively identify recurring issues and suggest product or process improvements
Qualifications
Master’s degree (or higher) in CS, Math, Engineering, or another technical field
3+ years of experience in a Technical Support Engineer, Application Support, or similar role in a SaaS environment
Strong understanding of Web technologies and APIs, SQL and data troubleshooting, Application debugging and log analysis
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Comfortable working with technical teams and translating customer issues into actionable insights
Excellent communication skills and a customer-focused mindset
Fluent in English (written and spoken)
Basic-to-intermediate French
Please send your resume in English (resumes in French will be automatically rejected)
.

title: Web Portal Designer (Internship)
description:
Company Description
SBS is committed to empowering its global sales teams with cutting-edge tools and resources. Our Sales Hub on SharePoint is the central platform for sales enablement, training, and communication. We are looking for a creative and detail-oriented intern to manage, optimize, and redesign this hub to make it more engaging and user-friendly.
Job Description
Role Overview:
As a
Web Portal Desiger Intern
, you will work closely with the Sales Enablement Operations team to improve the structure, design, and usability of the Sales Hub. This role is ideal for someone passionate about communication, user experience, and digital content management.
Key Responsibilities
Content Management: Organize, update, and maintain resources on the Sales Hub.
Redesign & UX: Propose and implement design improvements for better navigation and engagement.
Brand Alignment: Ensure the hub reflects SBS branding and visual identity guidelines.
Collaboration: Work with sales teams to gather feedback and incorporate their needs.
Automation & Optimization: Explore SharePoint features (web parts, workflows) to enhance functionality.
Documentation: Create clear guidelines for content updates and user best practices.
Qualifications
Preferred Skills & Qualifications:
Currently pursuing a degree in Communication, Digital Media, IT, or related field.
Strong interest in user experience and digital platforms.
Basic knowledge of SharePoint or willingness to learn quickly.
Creative mindset with attention to detail.
Good communication skills and ability to work collaboratively.
Fluency in English and in French
Nice To Have
Experience with SharePoint design, HTML/CSS, or Power Automate.
Familiarity with branding and visual design principles.
Previous projects in content management or intranet design.
Additional Information
What You’ll Learn
Hands-on experience with SharePoint administration and customization.
Best practices in digital communication and content strategy.
Exposure to sales enablement processes and enterprise collaboration tools.
Working with cross-functional teams in a global organization.
Benefits
Mentorship from experienced Sales Enablement and IT professionals.
Opportunity to lead a high-visibility project impacting global sales teams.

title: (Junior) Customer Success Operations Agent
description:
What you'll do
We are looking for a detail-driven Customer Success Operations Agent (Junior) to support the operations and back-office function of the Customer Success department in a growing and evolving organization.
This role supports day-to-day operational activities, helping ensure that processes, data, reporting, and coordination run smoothly across teams. You will collaborate closely with Customer Success and Operations stakeholders and contribute to building and improving operational structure as the organization scales. The scope of ownership, level of independence, and complexity of tasks will vary depending on experience and demonstrated capability.
This position is suitable for candidates early in their career as well as those with initial operational experience who enjoy structured work, reliable execution, and continuous improvement in a dynamic environment.
Operations & Back-Office Support
Support shared inboxes and internal request flows related to Customer Success operations.
Assistwith recurring and ad hoc operational activities such as coordination, documentation, and follow-ups across Customer Success andmeultipledepartments.
Maintain tasks, requests, and follow-ups in trackers and dashboards ina timelyand reliable manner.
Data, Reporting & Operational Support
Support the preparation of reports, data exports, and trackers based on existing guidelines.
Perform data checks to ensure accuracy, completeness, and consistency across systems and spreadsheets.
Support operational reporting dashboards, trackers, and operational files using tools such as Power BI, Confluence, JSM, and CRM tools.
Assistwith root causeanalysis preparationby gathering inputs, timelines, and supporting data.
Documentation, Process & Improvement Support
Work with existing processes, documentation, and checklists as a baseline for daily work.
Support keepingdocumentation, dashboards, and trackers up to date.
Identifygaps, inefficiencies, or unclear inputs and raise them with the team.
Contribute ideas for improving small processes, templates, or ways of working.
Support to Senior Operations & Compliance Activities
Assistwith preparatory and coordination tasks related to audits, compliance activities, and operational reviews.
Collect predefined inputs, documents, and evidence based on defined guidelines.
Supporttimelycoordination and tracking of compliance- and operations-related activities.
Why we should decide on you
Qualifications
0–3 years of experience in operations, back-office, service desk, coordination, incident or problem management, or similar roles.
Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Information Technology, Management, or a related field (preferred, but relevant experience may substitute).
Good written and spoken English skills.
Experience working with structured processes and internal tools.
Proven ability to manage and prioritize multiple requests with structure and attention to detail.
Comfortable working independently in a remote setup.
Willingness to learn and develop within Customer Success operations.
Key Attributes
Structured and organized, with the ability to work reliably within defined processes.
Comfortable handling shared inboxes, task queues, and internal request flows.
Confident working with spreadsheets and performing basic data validation.
Reliable in executing recurring and ad hoc operational tasks and meeting deadlines.
Comfortable using internal tools such as Power BI, Confluence, JSM, and CRM tools.
Clear written communication skills for internal coordination and status updates.
Ability toidentifymissing information, ask questions, and escalate appropriately.
Curious mindset with interest in understanding why processes exist.
Comfortable balancing structure with flexibility in a dynamic environment.
Motivated to learn, grow, and gradually take on broader operational responsibilities.
Nice to have
Exposure tooperational reporting, SLA data, or service metrics.
Experience in operations, back-office, service desk, coordination, or support roles.
Familiarity with tools such as Confluence, JSM, SharePoint, Power BI, CRM tools, or similar platforms.
Why you should decide on us
Market Leadership: Join a global leader where our agile culture and innovative spirit allow you to shape the future of financial stability.
International Scope: Take ownership of high-profile international projects and benefit from our global internal mobility initiatives.
Growth & Mentorship: Access a wide range of our technical and functional training opportunities.
Culture of Inclusion: We foster a supportive, transparent atmosphere with frequent team events and a commitment to diversity.
To get a first impression, we only need your CV and look forward to meeting you in a (personal/virtual) interview!
Recognizing the benefits of working in diverse teams, we are committed to equal employment opportunities regardless of gender, age, nationality, ethnic or social origin, disability, and sexual identity.
Are you interested? Apply now!
https://www.regnology.net
Apply for this job now
About Us
Regnology is a leading international provider of innovative regulatory, risk, and supervisory technology solutions (RegTech, RiskTech, and SupTech), of AEOI and tax reporting products, as well as of services along the Regulatory Value Chain for financial services. Regnology has been a partner for banks and regulators for 25 years. Until the end of 2020, the company was part of BearingPoint group and operated under the name BearingPoint RegTech. Since the sale of the RegTech business to private equity firm Nordic Capital, the company has been independent. In June 2021, the company joined forces with Vizor Software and recently changed its name to Regnology. In total, Regnology serves more than 7,000 financial services firms with reporting solutions. At the same time, the company enables more than 50 regulators and tax authorities on five continents to collect data from 34,000 firms in 60 countries. Regnology has a total workforce of over 770 employees at 17 office locations in 12 countries.
Any questions? Feel free to get in touch:
recruiting@regnology.net

title: Helpdesk & Customer Success Operations Agent
description:
About Regnology
Regnology is a leading technology firm on a mission to bring efficiency and stability to the financial markets. With an exclusive focus on regulatory reporting and more than 35,000 financial institutions, over 100 regulators, international organizations, and tax authorities relying on our solutions to process their regulatory reporting data, we are uniquely positioned to bring greater data quality, automation, and cost savings to all market participants. With a global team of over 1,200 employees, our clients can swiftly implement and derive value from our solutions and stay ahead of regulatory changes. Established in 2021 through the merger of BearingPoint RegTech and Vizor Software, Regnology is rapidly growing into a leading global regulatory reporting powerhouse.
Visit our website:
www.regnology.net
What you'll do
Do you excel at organization and enjoy helping others? Become a Helpdesk & Customer Success Operations Agent and be the first point of contact for our clients, managing support tickets and assisting our Customer Success Managers with operational tasks. In our fast-paced, expanding company, you’ll have the opportunity to wear multiple hats, adapt to new challenges, and grow your skills in a supportive environment — with a hybrid setup in Tunis, Tunisia.
Why we should decide on you
We are looking for a structured, reliable, and detail-oriented individual to join our Customer Success team as a Helpdesk & Customer Success Operations Agent. In this role, you will serve as a first-line contact for client support, while contributing to 24/7 global service coverage as part of a Follow the Sun (FTS) model.
As one of the first hires in your region, you will play a key role in helping us scale our support presence, streamline helpdesk operations, and provide back-office support to Customer Success Managers (CSMs). This is a role for someone who thrives in a fast-moving, international environment and wants to help improve the way we support and serve our clients.
Key Responsibilities:
Helpdesk & Client Support:
Act as the first point of contact for client inquiries via platforms like Jira Service Desk, Zendesk, or similar.
Triage and route tickets efficiently to the right internal teams, ensuring high-quality data capture and follow-up.
Monitor ticket queues, track resolution status, and escalate time-sensitive issues where needed.
Keep all client interactions and internal updates well-documented and easy to follow.
Customer Success Operations:
Provide back-office support to Customer Success Managers (CSMs) through CRM maintenance, meeting coordination, follow-up tracking, and internal workflows.
Help ensure accurate records and consistent updates across systems for full customer visibility.
Assist in improving internal CS processes, templates, and playbooks as the organization scales.
Global Coordination & Internal Operations:
Participate in a rotating on-call schedule to support time-sensitive tickets outside regular hours.
Ensure seamless handover and coordination with other regions as part of the Follow the Sun support model.
Contribute to internal reporting, operational documentation, and data entry tasks with a high standard of accuracy.
Identify recurring patterns or inefficiencies in workflows and suggest improvements.
Additional Scope (Where Applicable):
Occasionally assist with basic SaaS platform tasks, such as user access, permission changes, or routine configuration support.
Triage SaaS-related requests accurately and route them to the appropriate product or support teams.
Help refine internal FAQs and routing logic based on ticket experience.
Why we should decide on you:
Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Busineiss Administration, or a related field (preferred, but equivalent experience is acceptable)
Experience in helpdesk, IT support, customer support, or other service-oriented roles is a plus.
Experience working with ticketing systems, CRM platforms, or internal workflow tools.
Proven ability to manage and prioritize multiple requests with structure and attention to detail.
Strong written and verbal communication skills in English.
Willingness to participate in on-call or weekend coverage as part of a global rotation.
Your Key Attributes:
Highly organized and detail-oriented, with a strong sense of ownership and responsibility.
Brings structure and clarity to complex or ambiguous workflows.
Calm, dependable, and service-oriented, even under pressure.
Enjoys building efficient internal processes and improving day-to-day operations.
Works well across time zones and cultures, and is comfortable in a globally distributed team.
Curious and motivated to grow into broader Customer Success operations, enablement, or support coordination roles.
Why you should decide on us:
Let’s grow together, join a market leading
SaaS
company – our agile character and culture of innovation enables you to design our future.
We provide you with the opportunity to take on responsibility and participate in international projects.
In addition to our buddy-program, we offer numerous individual and wide-ranging training opportunities during which you can explore technical and functional areas.
Our internal mobility initiative encourages colleagues to transfer cross functionally to gain experience and promotes knowledge sharing.
We are proud of our positive working atmosphere characterized by a supportive team across various locations and countries and transparent communication across all levels.
Together we're better - meet your colleagues at our numerous team events.

title: Analyste BI RISQUES ET CONTRÔLE PERMANENT (F/H)
description:
VOS MISSIONS
Au sein du département Risk Management and Permanent Control de Tunis , vous serez rattaché(e) au Head of Risk Management and Permanent Control de Tunis et travaillerez en étroite collaboration avec le Responsable du Contrôle Permanent basé en France.
En tant qu’ Analyste BI, vous participerez à la mise en place, au suivi et à l’automatisation des dispositifs de contrôle permanent. Vous collaborerez avec les métiers, les équipes IT et le responsable du contrôle permanent afin d’identifier les besoins de données et de suivi.
Pour ce faire, vos principales missions seront les suivantes :
•En collaboration avec le responsable du contrôle permanent, conception, développement et maintien de dashboards Power BI à destination du pilotage du contrôle permanent (suivi des contrôles, incidents, plans d’action, etc. )
•Production régulière de reportings internes à destination du Group Risk management and Permanent Control department ou du Management,
•Contribution à l’analyse des résultats des contrôles, alerter en cas d’anomalies,
•Collecte, nettoyage, structuration et consolidation de données issues de différentes sources,
•Participer à l’amélioration continue des processus de suivi et d’analyse des données,
•Documenter les process et règles de gestion,
•Mettre en œuvre les bonnes pratiques en matière de documentation et de qualité des données.
Ce poste est basé à Tunis.
Les compétences que vous développerez
Vous intégrerez une équipe chargée de la gestion des risques et du contrôle permanent, qui fait partie du dispositif de gestion des risques et de contrôle permanent du Groupe ODDO BHF, responsable de la deuxième ligne de défense.
Votre poste vous permettra de travailler dans un environnement international et diversifié, en collaboration avec de nombreux experts de nos différents métiers et fonctions.
POURQUOI ODDO BHF ?
Chez ODDO BHF, nous avons le privilège de compter plus de 60000 clients, investisseurs institutionnels, entreprises, partenaires de distribution et grands clients privés dont nous conseillons, gérons et investissons les actifs financiers. Notre mission est de les faire fructifier via nos quatre métiers : Banque Privée, Gestion d’Actifs, Banque de Financement et d’Investissement, Service et Technologies Bancaires.
Ancrage européen, esprit entrepreneurial, pluralité d’expertises : ces atouts nous permettent de proposer des expériences professionnelles uniques, via des parcours variés et des opportunités de mobilités multiples et transverses en Europe.
PREREQUIS
•Vous avez une formation de niveau Bac+5 en école de commerce, ou école d'ingénieur.
•Vous avez une première expérience dans la data et/ou la finance.
•Vous avez une bonne connaissance des secteurs bancaires et financiers.
•Vous maîtrisez Power BI, SQL serait un plus,
•Vous êtes proactif, curieux,
•Vous avez un bon esprit d'analyse et des compétences solides en résolution de problèmes.
•Vous avez de bonnes compétences en communication à la fois avec les parties prenantes métiers et techniques.
•Vous parlez français et anglais couramment.

title: AI Video Marketing Internship
description:
About M365Consult
M365Consult is a fast-growing European Microsoft 365 consultancy specializing in digital transformation, cybersecurity, and AI-driven solutions for clients across the DACH region (Germany, Austria, Switzerland). Our team is passionate about innovation, collaboration, and building a strong brand presence across digital platforms. We are looking for motivated individuals eager to learn, grow, and help us communicate complex Microsoft topics through engaging video content.
To expand our brand and accelerate our reach, we are launching a remote internship for a motivated AI Video Marketing Intern, someone eager to learn how to create viral video content that speaks to both Microsoft experts and the organizations working with M365Consult on their cloud and security journey.
What This Internship Is About
This is not just about making videos; it is about building scalable, viral content systems. You will learn how to plan, generate, and scale video content using cutting-edge AI tools, collaborate with consultants and automation engineers, and simulate processes that will power the video content engine of a Microsoft-focused consulting brand.
You will gain hands-on experience with leading AI video tools and be part of shaping M365Consults' visual voice across:
YouTube Shorts and Instagram Reels
TikTok-style viral content
LinkedIn video posts and carousels
Client testimonial and success-story videos
Product and solution demo videos (Microsoft 365, security, Azure, AI)
Educational explainer content for business and IT audiences
AI-generated visual sequences and animations
Podcast- and webinar-to-video content repurposing
And most importantly, you will be challenged to navigate independently, grow fast, and own your learning path.
Structure & Expectations
Duration: 36 months (performance-based)
Format: Self-paced internship (flexible hours, fully remote)
Onboarding: Access to our AI tools, resources, and team for initial orientation
After onboarding: You are expected to drive your own progress and propose new viral video ideas aligned with our Microsoft 365 and security topics
Support: Light supervision, regular check-ins, and access to mentors, but creative initiative is key
What You'll Get Hands-On With
Sora, Veo3, HeyGen, Synthesia, Runway ML, Midjourney, and other cutting-edge AI tools for video and visuals
Suno (or similar) for AI audio generation and background music creation
AI prompt engineering for video, image, and audio content
Real-world viral video workflows: from manual creation to automation-ready processes
Cross-functional collaboration with consultants, tech teams, and social media/marketing managers
A platform to build a portfolio of viral content across multiple platforms and formats, focused on Microsoft 365, security, and AI consulting topics
Who We Are Looking For
You do not need to be an AI video expert (yet). We are looking for:
Strong interest in video content creation, social media trends, or tech/business topics
Curious, self-motivated learners who love experimenting with new AI tools
Understanding of what makes content perform on TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and LinkedIn
Passion for Microsoft technologies, IT consulting, cybersecurity, or digital marketing
Comfortable working independently and building your own creative structure
Excellent written English and basic German (preferred)

title: Development Intern
description:
Infor Decision Analytics and Science (IDEAS) team is responsible for setting the AI/ML strategy at Infor. Our industry-specific Augmented Intelligence (AI) solutions suite in Asset, Forecast, Inventory, Customer, Pricing, Sales, Data and Operational Intelligence domains provides rapid and measurable value to enterprise customers. In pursuit of advancing our AI solutions, IDEAS is currently seeking a Development Intern - Machine Learning (ML).
This internship will center on advancing IDEAS’ Forecasting solution by developing modern machine-learning-driven forecasting methods capable of handling lumpy, highly irregular, and intermittent demand patterns a key challenge in real-world supply chain and inventory planning.
A Day in The Life Typically Includes:
* Exploring a new frontier in forecasting, beginning with a systematic evaluation of foundational time-series approaches, including classical statistical models, machine-learning methods, and intermittent-demand techniques such as Croston, SBA, and TSB.
* Investigating advanced deep-learning architectures to model lumpy demand, including LSTM-based networks and state-of-the-art transformer models purpose-built for time series forecasting (e.g., Temporal Fusion Transformer, Informer, PatchTST).
* Evaluating the potential of large language models (LLMs) to enhance forecasting pipelines whether through feature generation, metadata understanding, demand-pattern classification, or hybrid architectures that combine semantic information with historical numerical data.
* Comparing all approaches using benchmark datasets to determine how these emerging models perform relative to the current Infor TS Forecasting Engine.
* Prototyping integrations into our existing architecture and identifying opportunities to strengthen Infor’s AI-driven forecasting capabilities across diverse business domains.
* Maintaining development artifacts and technical documentation in GitLab, ensuring reproducibility, traceability, and alignment with best engineering practices.
Basic Qualifications:
* Final year candidates in the Master's / Engineering program in Statistics, Mathematics, Physics, Computer Science, Operations Research, or a related quantitative discipline from an accredited university.
* Software development experience in Python and familiarity with scientific libraries commonly used in statistical analysis and machine learning e.g., pytorch, transformers library, and scikit-learn. Familiarity and basic understanding of PySpark, SQL or other data processing frameworks.
* Familiarity with software development environments such as Visual Studio Code, and version control using Git and CI/CD pipelines.
* Knowledge of data models, graphs, and relational databases. Proficiency in handling large datasets and data analysis with Tableau, Power BI, or similar BI tools.
Preferred Qualifications:
* Knowledge of core machine learning techniques.
* Knowledge of data models and relational databases. Experience handling large datasets and data analysis with BI tools.
* Familiarity with task management with JIRA.
About Infor

Join a global community of bold thinkers and innovators, where your expertise doesn’t just solve problems. it shapes industries, unlocks opportunities, and creates real-world impact for billions of people. title: Video Editor (Tunis)
description:
Role summary:
We are looking for an experienced video editor to join our busy studio and creative production team and ensure the broadcast of high-quality output on TV and online. The ideal candidate will be results driven and thrive in a busy, fast-paced environment whilst working on interesting and varied projects to edit content to broadcast standard. Strong working knowledge of edit and design software such as Adobe Creative Suite is essential.
Role responsibilities:
Understanding and following briefs from producers, outlines of footage and/or shot lists
Working with studio crew and camera operators to ensure that briefs are followed and required footage is shot in the best way
Assembling all raw footage, editing and manipulating it for broadcast
Operating equipment to ingest rushes and audio, manipulating to ensure best quality as necessary, synchronising and storing them into files
Assessing footage to ensure best composition for broadcast
Digitally cutting and manipulating files to put together the sequence of the programme and deciding what's usable for broadcast
Creating a 'rough cut' (or assembly edit) of the programme and determining the exact cutting for the next and final stages
Reordering and fine-tuning the content to ensure the logical sequencing and smooth running of programmes and adverts for broadcast
Overseeing the quality and progress of audio and video engineering and editing
Experimenting with styles and techniques including the design of graphic elements
Suggesting or selecting music
Online editing using required equipment - finalising technical aspects such as correcting faulty footage, grading and colouring and adding special effects.
Requirements:
Proven track record in video editing for broadcast with a minimum of 3 years’ experience
Strong technical knowledge of studio equipment and processes, including sound and lighting, and post-production equipment
Strong working knowledge of edit and design software such as Adobe Creative Suite
Ability to work effectively as part of a team and to strict specifications
Ability to manage conflicting deadlines and work under pressure
Familiarity with special effects, 3D and compositing

title: DATA SCIENTIST
description:
CDI
Tunis

RED TIC recherche un
Data Scientist
talentueux et passionné par la valorisation des données pour rejoindre notre équipe. Votre mission consistera à concevoir, développer et déployer des modèles analytiques et prédictifs afin d’orienter les décisions stratégiques de l’entreprise. Vous interviendrez à chaque étape du cycle de vie de la donnée — de sa collecte à son exploitation — dans un environnement collaboratif et orienté innovation.
Missions
Analyse Et Modélisation Des Données
Identifier, collecter et préparer les données issues de différentes sources internes et externes.
Concevoir et entraîner des modèles de machine learning et deep learning adaptés aux problématiques métier.
Évaluer la performance des modèles à l’aide de métriques pertinentes et les optimiser pour améliorer leur fiabilité.
Réaliser des analyses exploratoires et descriptives afin de détecter des tendances, corrélations et anomalies.
Exploitation Et Industrialisation
Collaborer avec les Data Engineers pour assurer la mise en production des modèles.
Développer des scripts et pipelines de traitement des données automatisés.
Participer à l’intégration des solutions analytiques dans les outils décisionnels de l’entreprise.
Documenter les modèles et assurer la traçabilité des résultats.
Collaboration Et Accompagnement
Travailler en étroite collaboration avec les équipes métiers pour comprendre leurs besoins et les traduire en solutions data-driven.
Présenter les résultats et insights de manière claire et visuelle (dashboards, visualisations, storytelling).
Participer à la diffusion d’une culture data au sein de l’entreprise.

Formation Bac+5 en Data Science, Mathématiques appliquées, Informatique ou Statistiques.
Minimum 3 à 5 ans d’expérience sur un poste similaire.

Solides compétences en statistiques, modélisation prédictive et analyse de données.
Bonne connaissance des environnements Cloud (AWS, Azure ou GCP) et des outils de visualisation (Power BI, Tableau, Looker).
Esprit analytique, rigueur scientifique et goût pour la résolution de problèmes complexes.
Excellentes capacités de communication pour vulgariser les résultats auprès des équipes métiers.
Pourquoi nous rejoindre ?
Intégrez une structure où la donnée est au cœur de la stratégie d’innovation.
Participez à des projets stimulants mêlant IA, automatisation et data engineering.
Collaborez avec des experts passionnés dans un environnement agile et collaboratif.
Bénéficiez d’un cadre de travail flexible et d’opportunités d’évolution à fort potentiel.
